address: 543 Corydon Avenue, Winnipeg, MB R3L 0P3, Canada

cards.title: Professional Atmosphere
cards.description: Hygiene and comfort come first. Our rooms are certified to Canadian standards and radiate a warm, welcoming energy.

cards.title: Custom Designs
cards.description: From Neo-Traditional to Fine Line – every design is created in close collaboration with you. Your vision, our expertise.

cards.title: Artist Family
cards.description: Bluebird is more than a studio – it's a meeting point for tattoo enthusiasts in Winnipeg. Regular guest spots and events.

googleReviews.text: Absolutely professional and creative! My two tattoos are perfect artworks. Studio is very clean, great atmosphere.
googleReviews.author: Jessica M.

googleReviews.text: Best experience in Winnipeg. The team listens and gives fantastic advice. Highly recommended!
googleReviews.author: Daniel P.

googleReviews.text: Very friendly artists, fair price. Appointment was on time. Will come back for my next design.
googleReviews.author: Sam K.

googleReviews.text: Incredible detail, super friendly artists. Best shop in Osborne Village!
googleReviews.author: Taylor R.

socialMedia.description: Daily flash art, studio updates & live sessions.
